Meta.Name: Meta Skill Builder
Meta.Description: Builds and upgrades executable V4 skills by consuming the Atomic Knowledge Synthesis Pipeline v2.1. Takes clustered atoms, architecture specs, and patch packs, then compiles them into validated SkillML V1.4 XML files in .agents/skills/{domain}/.
Meta.PrimaryOutcome: Production-ready SkillML V1.4 XML skill files

Input.Name: skill_brief
Input.Description: Requested role, family, domain, target behavior, and track assignment.

Input.Name: architecture_spec
Input.Description: Approved role boundaries and decomposition design from meta_skill_architect. Includes relational links, wake conditions, and ownership assignments.

Input.Name: patch_pack
Input.Description: NotebookLM enhancement outputs: heuristics, failure modes, missing atoms, doctrine corrections. See META_PATCH_PACK_V4.md for format.

Input.Name: clustered_atoms
Input.Description: Skill Atoms grouped by target skill via NotebookLM Router (Layer 2 of Atomic Pipeline v2.1). Categories: heuristic, spec, failure, framework, pattern, checklist, workflow.

Input.Name: legacy_asset
Input.Description: Current file to patch or replace. Preserved content is extracted, not copied forward blindly.

Input.Name: relational_map
Input.Description: Family relational operations map (e.g., meta_relational_operations_v4.yaml) defining upstream, downstream, wake conditions, and ownership.

Output.Name: v4_skill_asset
Output.Description: Canonical executable skill in SkillML V1.4 XML. Placed in .agents/skills/{domain}/{skill_id}_v{version}.xml. Must pass 19/19 validator checks.

Output.Name: alias_update
Output.Description: New or changed alias entries for orchestration/routing/aliases.yaml (legacy name to canonical skill_id).

Output.Name: validation_report
Output.Description: Results from skillml_validator, lint_skill, and alias_resolver runs.

Output.Name: patch_applied_summary
Output.Description: Appended to the source patch file: what changed, what was preserved, unresolved contradictions, and second-patch recommendation.

Rules.Rule: Use the Atomic Knowledge Synthesis Pipeline v2.1 as the canonical manufacturing process: Skill Atoms to NotebookLM Router to Claude Synthesizer to SkillML V1.4 XML.
Do not preserve legacy naming when a canonical V4 ID exists. Update aliases.yaml for backward compatibility.

Every executable skill must contain all 5 required sections (Meta, Contract, ExecutionProtocol, SelfCheck, PatchLog), all 4 layer tags (CONTRACT, RULES, REASONING, IMPL), and explicit relational contracts.
If legacy content conflicts with canonical doctrine, update toward doctrine. Do not copy stale patterns forward.
Doctrine stays in markdown reference docs. Only routable, executable, testable behavior goes into XML skills (H2: Doctrine Out, Contracts In).
Every built skill must declare patch_owner and review_owner per the family relational operations map.
Benchmark all new builds against meta_zpwo (first V1.4-compliant skill, 19/19).

Step.Name: Ingest Brief and Context
Step.Action: Load architecture_spec from meta_skill_architect. Load patch_pack and clustered_atoms if available. Load relational_map for upstream/downstream/ownership. Load legacy_asset if this is a patch (not a new build).
Step.Validation: All required inputs present. Architecture spec approved.

Step.Name: Map Atoms to Sections
Step.Action: Apply the Atomic Pipeline v2.1 atom-to-section mapping: - framework atoms to Meta (Description, PrimaryOutcome) - spec atoms to Contract (Inputs, Outputs) - heuristic atoms to ExecutionProtocol Rules - workflow atoms to ReasoningFramework Steps - pattern atoms to Implementation - checklist atoms to SelfCheck Check elements - failure atoms to SelfCheck FailureModes If no atoms available, extract equivalent content from legacy asset or architecture spec.
Step.Validation: Every V1.4 section has source material identified.

Step.Name: Build V4 Asset
Step.Action: Generate SkillML V1.4 XML using master_skill_template_v1.xml as scaffold. Populate all 5 required sections. Add all 4 layer tags (CONTRACT, RULES, REASONING, IMPL). Add minimum 3 SelfCheck elements + MMAGate + FailureModes. Add PatchLog entry with atom sources listed. Write to .agents/skills/{domain}/{skill_id}_v{version}.xml.
Step.Validation: File is well-formed XML with all required elements.

Step.Name: Validate
Step.Action: Run post-synthesis quality gates: - python tools/skillml_validator.py (must pass 19/19) - python tools/lint_skill.py (migration score target 80%+) - python tools/alias_resolver.py (routing resolution check) Fix any failures. Circuit breaker: max 3 fix attempts before escalating to meta_skill_architect.
Step.Validation: 19/19 validator checks pass. Lint score at or above 80%.

Step.Name: Emit Handoff Artifacts
Step.Action: Generate: - alias_update: new entries for aliases.yaml (if new skill or renamed) - validation_report: validator + linter output - patch_applied_summary: appended to source patch file Hand off to meta_mma for quality gate review. Run python tools/manifest_builder.py to update inventory.
Step.Validation: Patch file updated. Manifest reflects new or changed skill.

Workflow.Phase: Use when creating a skill from scratch: 1. Receive brief + architecture spec from meta_skill_architect 2. Cluster atoms via NotebookLM Router (Pipeline Layer 2) 3. Compile atoms into XML via Claude Synthesizer (Pipeline Layer 3) 4. Validate 19/19 + lint score 5. Emit handoff artifacts

Use when upgrading an existing skill: 1. Receive audit findings from meta_skill_auditor 2. Load legacy asset and patch_pack 3. Extract preservable content from legacy 4. Rebuild in V1.4 structure (do not patch legacy XML in place) 5. Validate and emit

Use when migrating a domain family: 1. Receive family audit and relational map 2. Process skills in dependency order (upstream first) 3. Build each skill individually 4. Update aliases.yaml and manifest after each 5. Re-audit family after batch complete

Tools.Tool: Validate V1.4 structure (19 checks). Must pass before handoff.
Extended linting and migration readiness scoring. Target: 80%+.
Verify routing resolution for new or changed skill_ids.
Regenerate SKILLS_MANIFEST.yaml after skill creation or change.

Implementation.QuickReference:
BUILDER FLOW (Single Skill) 1. Read brief + architecture spec + patch pack 2. Map atoms to V1.4 sections (framework->Meta, spec->Contract, etc.) 3. Build XML using master template scaffold 4. Run: python tools/skillml_validator.py (19/19 required) 5. Run: python tools/lint_skill.py (80%+ required) 6. Emit alias_update + validation_report + patch_applied_summary 7. Hand off to meta_mma for review gate
BUILDER FLOW (Batch Migration) 1. Load family audit + relational map 2. Sort by dependency (upstream first) 3. Build each skill per single-skill flow 4. Update aliases.yaml after each 5. Run manifest_builder after batch 6. Request family re-audit from meta_skill_auditor

Check.Name: V1.4 Compliance
Check.Condition: Every built skill passes 19/19 skillml_validator checks.
Check.OnFail: Fix structural issues. Max 3 attempts before escalating to meta_skill_architect.

Check.Name: Relational Contracts Present
Check.Condition: Every built skill declares upstream, downstream, wake conditions, patch_owner, and review_owner.
Check.OnFail: Add relational contracts from the family relational operations map.

Check.Name: Pipeline Alignment
Check.Condition: Every built skill references the Atomic Pipeline v2.1 as synthesis source, not Prism or legacy pipeline.
Check.OnFail: Replace stale pipeline references with canonical atomic doctrine.

Check.Name: Discovery Metadata
Check.Condition: Built skill has skill_id, version, status, Domain, Track, TeamRole, TriggerCommands in Meta.
Check.OnFail: Block handoff until discovery fields are present (H5: Discovery Is A First-Class Quality Gate).

Check.Name: Doctrine Separation
Check.Condition: XML skill contains only executable behavior. Reference doctrine stays in markdown companion docs.
Check.OnFail: Extract doctrine content to a reference .md file. Keep only contracts and executable logic in XML.

MMAGate.Trigger: Before handing off to meta_mma for re-audit.
MMAGate.OnFail: Fix loop (max 3). If exhausted, escalate to meta_skill_architect with PATCH_PROPOSAL.

Mode.name: legacy_copy_forward
Mode.Symptom: Legacy structure or naming copied forward instead of rebuilt.
Mode.Cause: Builder patched in place instead of rebuilding from canonical contracts.
Mode.Fix: Start from master template. Extract preservable content from legacy. Rebuild.

Mode.name: template_mismatch
Mode.Symptom: Built skill uses outdated section structure or missing layer tags.
Mode.Cause: Builder used stale template or skipped template refresh.

Mode.name: discovery_collapse
Mode.Symptom: Built skill cannot be found by routing or manifest systems.
Mode.Cause: Missing or malformed skill_id, TriggerCommands, or Domain fields.
Mode.Fix: Block handoff. Add discovery metadata. Run alias_resolver to verify resolution.

Mode.name: pipeline_drift
Mode.Symptom: Builder references Prism, SKILL.md bundles, or other retired pipeline stages.
Mode.Cause: Stale doctrine in builder context or legacy instructions in brief.
Mode.Fix: Canonical pipeline is Atomic v2.1: Atoms to NotebookLM to Claude to SkillML V1.4 XML.

PatchLog.Entry: Created canonical build role from legacy skill_builder_v1.2.0. Normalized skill_id to meta_skill_builder. Integrated Atomic Pipeline v2.1 as synthesis source. Added explicit atom-to-section mapping. Added relational contracts (upstream: architect/auditor/template, downstream: mma/manifest). Added 5 SelfCheck elements aligned to META_PATCH_PACK_V4 heuristics and failure modes (H2 Doctrine Out, H3 Relational Links, H5 Discovery, FM1 Pipeline Drift, FM2 Role Bleed, FM3 Discovery Collapse). Added 3 workflow phases (new_build, patch_upgrade, batch_migration). Added 4 tool references (validator, linter, resolver, manifest). Patch ownership: meta_skill_builder. Review ownership: meta_mma.
